title: Cannot properly boot podman machine after reboot with wsl
body:
### Issue Description

After upgrade to 24h2 / podman 5.2 ( I don't know which one cause the issue, but they are all changes I've done before the issue comes up) .

Everything works fine after the first day, But once I reboot the machine and all containers/volume/image disappear in podman desktop, and cli command cannot connect to podman socket. I have tried reinstall podman but not work. 

Later I found that stop the machine from podman and boot machine by wsl command make it back to work. I don't know how it matters so I came here for help.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. reboot, wait podman autostart
2. test if podman cli works
3. run podman machine stop and wsl --shutdown, then run wsl


### Describe the results you received

cannot connect to podman machine (127.0.0.1:xxxxx)

### Describe the results you expected

podman ps show normal output

comments.body:
podman has no autostart, if you use auto start then this is likely something done by podman-desktop and not podman.

If you just use podman machine it is definitely expected that you have to run podman machine start after each boot.

> Steps to reproduce the issue
> 
> 1. reboot, wait podman autostart
> 2. test if podman cli works
> 3. run podman machine stop and wsl --shutdown, then run wsl

Something in the logic seems wrong here. Could you try and report back on the following:

1. Reboot
2. what is the output of `podman machine ls`?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Closing as there was no answers to the questions asked.
